title: ContentSmith - MMORPG Content Editor

dialogues.title: Dialogue System

quests.title: Quest Management
quests.description: Design complex quest chains with objectives, rewards, and player progression

skills.title: Skills

entityAttributes.title: Entity Attributes
entityAttributes.description: Manage base attributes for characters, monsters and other entities

races.title: Races
races.description: Configure playable and non-playable races with their stat modifiers

items.title: Items
items.description: Manage items, equipment, rarity and item types

mobs.title: Mobs
mobs.description: Create and manage monsters, their stats, spawn zones and loot

spawnZones.title: Spawn Zones
spawnZones.description: Define spawn locations with coordinates, respawn timers and mob assignments

vendors.title: Vendors
vendors.description: Configure merchant NPCs with their inventories and pricing

classes.title: Classes
classes.description: Design character classes with progression, available skills and attributes

zones.title: Zones
zones.description: Manage game world zones, regions and their properties

localization.title: Localization Tools
localization.description: Manage translations and localized content for multiple languages

heroSubtitle: Your professional toolkit for building MMORPG game content

welcome.title: Welcome to ContentSmith
